codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 85bc35c. The rotate-keyset adaptation screens satisfy the feature description and expected behavior: create-profile uses rotate stepper state and required sections/copy, distribute renders the three required share cards with fresh-share language and locked Share 3 actions, and completion renders the required member rows/success card with finish navigation to dashboard profile.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Library architecture routing docs are stale for current app scope and omit rotate-keyset routes, so workers must inspect CoreRoutes directly for accurate route coverage.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:15-27 lists only /create* and /dashboard routes; transcript shows worker reading src/app/CoreRoutes.tsx to determine actual rotate-keyset paths.

summary: Feature passes scrutiny. Implementation and tests in commit 85bc35c cover the rotate-keyset adaptation fidelity requirements for Create Profile, Distribute Shares, and Distribution Completion.
